creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Fri Aug 19 21:56:18 UTC 2016
New revision: 420491
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/420491

Log:
  Arc is a flat theme with transparent elements for GTK 3, GTK 2 and
  Gnome-Shell which supports GTK 3 and GTK 2 based desktop environments like
  Gnome, Unity, Budgie, Pantheon, XFCE, Mate, etc.

  WWW: https://github.com/horst3180/arc-theme

  PR:		211710
  Submitted by:	mail_me@riseup.net

Changes:
  head/x11-themes/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes/
  head/x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes/distinfo
  head/x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes/pkg-descr
  head/x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes/pkg-plist
